tweets.full_text:
@nvidia  and @IREN_Ltd  Announce Strategic Partnership to Accelerate Deployment of up to 5 Gigawatts of AI Infrastructure

IREN) today announced a strategic partnership to accelerate deployment of next-generation AI infrastructure.

As part of the partnership:

$NVDA and $IREN intend to support deployment of up to 5 gigawatts of NVIDIA DSX-aligned AI infrastructure across IREN’s global data center pipeline over time.

NVIDIA and IREN will collaborate on deployment of NVIDIA accelerated compute in DSX AI factories to expand access to AI-native, startup and enterprise customers.

As part of the partnership, IREN issued to NVIDIA a five-year right to purchase up to 30 million shares of ordinary stock at an exercise price of $70 per share, resulting in a right to invest up to $2.1 billion, subject to certain conditions including regulatory.

The partnership is intended to accelerate deployment of large-scale AI factories by combining NVIDIA’s DSX AI factory architecture with IREN’s expertise across power, land, data centers, GPU deployment and infrastructure operations.

Future deployments are expected to focus on IREN’s 2-gigawatt Sweetwater campus in Texas, which the companies expect to serve as a flagship deployment for NVIDIA’s DSX architecture.

“AI factories are becoming foundational infrastructure for the global economy,” said Jensen Huang, founder and CEO of NVIDIA. “Deploying these systems at scale requires deep integration across the full stack — compute, networking, software, power and operations. IREN brings the scale and infrastructure expertise to help accelerate the buildout of next-generation AI infrastructure globally. Together, we are building for the age of AI.”

“This partnership combines NVIDIA’s AI systems and architecture leadership with IREN’s expertise across power, land, data centers, GPU deployment and infrastructure operations,” said Daniel Roberts, cofounder and co-CEO of IREN. “Together, we believe we can accelerate deployment of AI infrastructure and expand access to compute for AI-native and enterprise customers globally.”

Commentary on NOW from Claude. NOW is the portfolio largest position at 12.4%:

Action Fabric, announced at Knowledge today, is the moment ServiceNow stopped fighting agentic AI and started selling the rails it runs on. Claude is one of the agents that would consume it.

The Day 2 keynote put Action Fabric on stage as an open platform for external frontier models, Claude and Copilot and Gemini named explicitly, to execute ServiceNow workflows, SLAs, and the Knowledge Graph under governance. Day 1 yesterday had already shipped AI Control Tower across 30+ integrations with NVIDIA Enterprise AI Factory: governance, observability, risk-scoring, least-privilege access, kill switches, all of it. Day 2 added Otto as a unified enterprise AI agent and Workflow Data Fabric with 250+ connectors. The cumulative product story is that ServiceNow becomes the orchestration and governance substrate any enterprise AI deployment needs to operate inside.

Why this matters for the position. The bear case downgrade UBS published Apr 10, KeyBanc's $85 target, and the broader "Copilot eats ITSM seats" thesis all priced one outcome: agentic AI displaces ServiceNow's seat-based revenue. The product released today inverts the question. Enterprises don't unplug their CMDB, identity layer, or workflow graph because Claude or Copilot got better. They route the agent through them. Action Fabric is ServiceNow charging for that traffic.

The position. I entered at 8% on Apr 10 as a SaaS-dislocation play. The Apr 22 print took the stock down 17.8% on a Q2 op margin guide of 26.5% versus Street 31.5%, an Armis and Veza integration cost front-load. cRPO underneath accelerated to +21% constant currency, FY26 subscription guide up about $200M, total RPO $27.7B. I sized up from 7.55% to 11.55% on Apr 24. May 4 Analyst Day raised the 2030 subscription target above $30B at roughly 20% CAGR, lifted FY26 AI ACV 50% to $1.5B, doubled the buyback authorization to $4.2B remaining. The position has drifted to 12.14%, top weight in my book.

Spot $93.59, +5.1% today on 27.3M shares. Forward P/E 18.4x, PEG 0.88, below the systems software cohort median. Mean PT $142, with post-Analyst-Day raises clustering around Citizens $157, Evercore $150, BTIG $150, Barclays $134. My 12M base case is $115 with a +30% probability-weighted expected return across bull $155 / base $115 / bear $78 scenarios. The Q2 operating margin print on Jul 22 is the binary that resolves whether 26.5% is a floor or a run rate. The macro overlay is Warsh's confirmation vote and April CPI on May 12, both of which can compress long-duration multiples another two or three turns on the wrong number. How I'm reading it, not how anyone else should.

Lightchain AI Mainnet Launch: The Beginning of Community-Governed Decentralized AI

Today marks a defining milestone for Lightchain AI.

After a long road of development, testing, refinement, governance discussions, community feedback, infrastructure upgrades, and continued belief from supporters across the ecosystem, Lightchain AI has reached mainnet.

This is not just a network launch.

This is the beginning of Lightchain AI as a live decentralized AI ecosystem.

It is the beginning of a new phase for AI infrastructure that is not controlled by a central authority. It is the beginning of broader community participation, builder access, worker deployment, open development, DAO governance, and decentralized AI applications built on top of Lightchain.

The voice of the community has continued to drive Lightchain forward. That same voice continues to drive the Lightchain DUNA. This launch marks the start of Lightchain AI becoming what it was always intended to be: a community-led decentralized AI network where governance, development direction, participation, and ecosystem growth are shaped by the people who build, support, and use the network.

Mainnet is live.

The next chapter begins now.

Mainnet Explorer Is Live

The Lightchain AI mainnet explorer is now available:

Mainnet Explorer: https://t.co/wClsQvPuXz

The explorer gives the community visibility into mainnet activity, including blocks, transactions, contracts, accounts, and network-level data. As mainnet activity grows, this will become one of the most important places for users, builders, workers, and contributors to track the live state of the Lightchain ecosystem.

Mainnet transparency matters.

A decentralized AI network should be visible, verifiable, and open for the community to observe. The explorer is a key part of that foundation.

Bridge to Mainnet

Users can begin accessing mainnet through the Lightchain Bridge:

Bridge to Mainnet: https://t.co/hbbWCEA4Ca

The bridge is an important piece of the mainnet rollout because it allows users to move into the live Lightchain ecosystem and begin preparing for the next phase of participation.

As always, users should verify that they are using official Lightchain links before interacting with any bridge, wallet, explorer, DEX, DAO, launchpad, or ecosystem application.

Updated Mainnet Worker Documentation

Workers can now begin preparing for mainnet participation using the updated worker documentation:

Run a Worker on Mainnet: https://t.co/6U2fwj0l0Z

Workers are a core part of Lightchain AI. The updated mainnet worker guide describes workers as the supply side of the network, running whitelisted models through Ollama, operating alongside the Worker Sidecar, serving encrypted inference jobs through the Worker Gateway, and earning fees for completed jobs.

The updated mainnet guide also outlines the full worker lifecycle, including prerequisites, mainnet network references, worker key generation, model setup, funding, on-chain registration, running the worker, verifying activity, rewards, slashing and jailing considerations, deregistration, and mainnet contract references.

This is one of the most important participation layers in the Lightchain AI network.

Workers help turn decentralized AI from an idea into an operating network. They allow inference workloads to be served through distributed participation rather than centralized control. They give contributors a path to support the network directly. They also help create the foundation for decentralized AI applications that rely on live, community-powered infrastructure.

Mainnet worker participation is now a major focus for the ecosystem.

Chat Inference Update: Signature Requirement Removal Is a Priority

At launch, inference on chat currently requires a signature.

This is already a priority update.

In the next update, removing the current signature requirement for chat inference will be a key focus so that the user experience becomes smoother, faster, and easier to access.

This matters because Lightchain AI is not only building infrastructure for developers and workers. It is also building toward AI experiences that normal users can interact with without unnecessary friction.

The goal is to make decentralized AI feel simple, accessible, and usable.

The first version of mainnet chat inference is part of the launch foundation. The next priority is improving that flow so users can interact more naturally while the network continues to mature.

DAO on Mainnet: No Wrapping Required

The Lightchain DAO will also be moving into the mainnet phase soon.

A key point for the community: DAO participation on mainnet will not require wrapping.

This is important because governance should be as direct and accessible as possible. The Lightchain DAO is not meant to be a closed process or a governance layer controlled by a central party. It is meant to be the voice of the community.

The DAO moving to mainnet without requiring wrapping helps simplify participation and keeps the governance experience aligned with the broader goal of open, community-led decision-making.

The Lightchain DUNA continues to be driven by the community, and the DAO will remain one of the most important mechanisms for shaping the direction of the ecosystem.

Lightchain AI was built around the principle that decentralized AI should not have a central authority deciding everything behind closed doors. The community must have a real role in shaping the network.

Mainnet DAO participation is a major step toward that future.

Meme Launchpad Coming Soon

The Meme Launchpad will also be coming soon as part of the continued mainnet rollout.

This adds another important piece to the Lightchain ecosystem by giving the community more ways to create, launch, experiment, and participate in new token activity on mainnet.

The Meme Launchpad will help expand community-driven creation inside the Lightchain ecosystem. It gives users and builders another path to bring ideas to life, create culture around the network, and support broader ecosystem activity.

Mainnet is not only about infrastructure.

It is also about participation.

It is about giving the community tools to create.

It is about giving builders and users more ways to activate the network.

The Meme Launchpad will be part of that next stage.

DEX Coming Soon — Builders Can Start Building Today

The Lightchain DEX is also coming soon.

This will be another major component of the mainnet ecosystem, giving users a native place to trade, interact with liquidity, and support token activity across the network.

But importantly, builders do not have to wait.

Builders can openly create and build a DEX on Lightchain starting today.

Mainnet is open for builders.

Developers who want to experiment with decentralized exchange infrastructure, liquidity tools, trading interfaces, DeFi applications, token launches, AI-powered market tools, or ecosystem-specific financial applications can begin building now.

This is an important message for the entire builder community:

Lightchain AI mainnet is not a closed environment.

It is open infrastructure.

The ecosystem is not limited to one team, one application, one product, or one central authority. Builders can create. Developers can experiment. The community can propose, launch, test, and improve. That is how a decentralized ecosystem grows.

The upcoming DEX will be an important part of the Lightchain ecosystem, but the opportunity for builders begins immediately.

Mainnet Is the Foundation, Not the Finish Line

The mainnet launch is a major achievement, but it is not the end of development.

It is the beginning of the next development phase.

Over the next several months, Lightchain AI will continue rolling out development updates periodically. The community should expect regular updates as new features, improvements, infrastructure upgrades, governance tools, ecosystem applications, and user experience refinements continue to be released.

This continued rollout will include work across several important areas:

Chat inference improvements, including removal of the current signature requirement.
Mainnet DAO rollout with no wrapping required.
Meme Launchpad release.
DEX release and broader DeFi ecosystem development.
Open builder support for DEX and decentralized applications.
Worker onboarding and worker network growth.
Mainnet explorer improvements and network visibility.
Bridge monitoring and mainnet flow improvements.
Model governance expansion.
Developer tooling improvements.
AI application infrastructure.
Continued AIVM-related development.
Governance updates through the community and Lightchain DUNA.
Periodic public updates over the next several months.

Mainnet gives the ecosystem a live foundation.

Now the work shifts toward expansion, refinement, adoption, and community-led growth.

Workers: A Core Layer of Decentralized AI

One of the most important next steps for Lightchain AI is growing the worker network.

Workers are essential because they help provide the infrastructure required for decentralized inference. They run models, connect to the network, process jobs, and support the broader AI execution layer.

The updated mainnet worker documentation gives operators a clear path to begin participating:

Mainnet Worker Docs: https://t.co/6U2fwj0l0Z

The guide includes important mainnet details such as RPC information, chain ID, Worker Gateway, model requirements, staking requirements, worker setup, and verification steps. The documentation notes that mainnet LCAI has real value and users should double-check every address, RPC URL, and chain ID before signing transactions.

This is an important caution for all mainnet participants.

Mainnet is live infrastructure.

Transactions matter.

Keys matter.

Addresses matter.

Users should take the time to read documentation carefully, verify official sources, and understand the steps before deploying a worker or moving funds.

Developers: Start Building on Mainnet

Lightchain AI mainnet is open for builders.

This is one of the most important parts of the launch.

Builders can start creating applications, tools, interfaces, dashboards, governance utilities, DeFi products, DEX infrastructure, launchpad concepts, AI applications, model tooling, and ecosystem experiences today.

The Lightchain ecosystem is not meant to be a single app or a single product.

It is meant to become a decentralized AI network with many layers of contribution.

That includes:

Workers providing AI inference capacity.
Builders creating applications and tools.
Users interacting with AI and ecosystem products.
DAO participants shaping governance.
Token holders supporting the network.
Community members proposing ideas.
Developers expanding DeFi and DEX infrastructure.
Contributors helping improve documentation, education, and adoption.

Mainnet opens the door for all of this.

The more builders that participate, the stronger the ecosystem becomes.

The Community Drives the Future of Lightchain AI

The Lightchain AI mainnet launch is a technical milestone, but it is also a community milestone.

This project has reached this point because the community continued to believe in the vision of decentralized AI.

That matters.

The Lightchain DUNA continues to be driven by the voice of the community. This is not a network built around a single authority deciding the future of AI infrastructure for everyone else. It is a network built around participation, decentralization, governance, and open development.

The community is the force behind Lightchain AI.

The community pushed the vision forward.

The community will continue to shape what comes next.

And the community will remain central as the DAO moves further into mainnet, as builders create new applications, as workers come online, as the DEX and Meme Launchpad roll out, and as decentralized AI becomes more usable, more visible, and more powerful.

True decentralized AI cannot be built behind closed doors.

It must be built in the open.

It must be governed by the people who use it.

It must allow builders to build without permission.

It must allow contributors to participate without relying on a central gatekeeper.

It must allow governance to evolve through the community.

That is the purpose of Lightchain AI.

The Next Several Months

The next several months will be an active rollout period.

The team and community will continue releasing updates periodically as development progresses. These updates will cover the next stages of mainnet infrastructure, application releases, DAO activation, worker improvements, DeFi tools, launchpad development, chat improvements, and broader ecosystem growth.

Some updates will be technical.

Some will be governance-related.

Some will focus on user experience.

Some will focus on builders.

Some will focus on workers.

All of them will move Lightchain AI closer to the long-term goal: a decentralized AI ecosystem with no central authority, powered by community participation and open development.

The launch of mainnet is the moment where the network begins its next phase.

But the rollout continues.

The building continues.

The governance continues.

The community continues.

Key Mainnet Links

Bridge to Mainnet:
 https://t.co/hbbWCEA4Ca
Mainnet Explorer:
 https://t.co/wClsQvPuXz

Run a Worker on Mainnet:
 https://t.co/6U2fwj0l0Z
A Long Road to a New Beginning

It has been a long time to reach this goal.
Mainnet represents years of vision, development, discussion, community patience, and continued belief in what Lightchain AI can become.

There have been many steps along the way. Testnet progress. Documentation updates. Governance conversations. Infrastructure improvements. Worker development. Bridge preparation. Ecosystem planning. Community debate. Builder interest. DAO formation. Technical refinement.

All of it led to this moment.

But this is not the end.

This is the beginning.

Lightchain AI mainnet is now the foundation for the next era of decentralized AI.

The bridge is open.

The explorer is live.

The updated worker documentation is available.

DAO on mainnet is coming soon and will not require wrapping.

The Meme Launchpad is coming soon.

The DEX is coming soon.

Builders can begin creating and building a DEX today.

Chat inference improvements are already a priority, with the current signature requirement planned to be removed in the next update.

Regular development updates will continue over the next several months.

The community remains the voice of Lightchain DUNA.

And Lightchain AI continues forward as a decentralized AI network with no central authority.

This is the beginning of Lightchain AI on mainnet.

This is the beginning of community-governed decentralized AI.

This is the beginning of a network shaped by builders, workers, users, contributors, token holders, and the community itself.

The future of decentralized AI starts here.

・経常利益：29億72百万円（前年比+0.5%）
・中間純利益：20億27百万円（前年比+3.1%）

社会人教育市場では人的資本経営を通じた企業価値向上の機運や人手不足・採用難等を背景に底堅い需要が継続しました🏋️‍♀️

講師派遣型研修事業ではDX関連研修が+13.2%増、公開講座事業もDX受講者数+31.3%増、ITサービス事業のLMS「Leaf」もアクティブユーザー530万人超・ARR+29.3%増と順調に拡大しています🎏

ただし総人件費が+16.2%増加し、営業利益は+0.3%増にとどまる結果となりましたね🎏💭

■配当予想、自社株買い
・配当予想は据え置き（年間29.50円）
・新規で自社株買いの発表はなし

■配当方針
・配当性向や明示的なDOE方針の記載はなし

■通期予想（下方修正）
・売上高：160億円（-4.8%）
・営業利益：63億80百万円（-6.2%）
・経常利益：64億30百万円（-5.4%）
・純利益：44億円（-5.0%）

売上高は全事業で成長が見込まれるものの、講師派遣型研修事業とITサービス事業が計画を下回る見込みであることから期初予想168億円から160億円に修正しました🎏

営業利益は生成AI活用により第3四半期以降は人件費の増加を計画比で圧縮できるものの、売上高の修正に伴い68億円から63.8億円に修正していますね🎏💭

🎏総評まとめ
社会人教育の底堅い需要とDX教育市場の拡大を追い風に売上+8.0%と伸長、LMS「Leaf」も有料組織+11.4%増・ARR+29.3%増とサブスク基盤の拡大が続く好調な決算でした🏋️‍♀️

ただし総人件費の+16.2%増で営業利益は+0.3%増と利益伸長が鈍化、通期業績予想を売上-4.8%・営業利益-6.2%に下方修正しています✋️

第3四半期以降は生成AI活用による業務効率化で人件費圧縮を見込んでおり、配当は年間29.5円は据置でなんとか耐えた格好の決算でしたね🎏💭

tweets.full_text:
三菱UFJがGoogleとAI連携を発表しました。スマホで商品を撮影すれば、AIが最安値の購入先を探し、ポイント還元率の高い支払い方法を選び、決済まで完了させる。そういう世界が2027年度にも始まります。

これは「銀行のアプリ改良」ではありません。GoogleのAI(Gemini)・検索・地図・YouTubeと、三菱UFJが持つ6000万人分の金融データが一本の動線で結ばれる、という話です。

利用者にとっての意味は3点です。「選ぶ手間が減る」「最適な決済が自動で選ばれる」「家計簿が自動で更新される」。日常の買い物の摩擦がひとつずつ消えていきます。

同時に、問い直しておく価値のある点もあります。「AIが選ぶ」と「自分が選ぶ」は違います。便利さを引き受けるたびに、自分の購買行動はより精密に記録され、次の提案の精度を上げる材料になります。それは悪いことではない。ただ、その取引を意識しているかどうかで、サービスとの向き合い方は変わります。

三井住友のOliveに個人顧客を奪われてきた三菱UFJが、Googleという強力な技術パートナーを得て反転攻勢に出る局面です。日本の個人金融の主戦場は、銀行の窓口でもATMでもなく、スマホの画面になりました。
